chunks.text: Reporter controls marked the mechanosensory neuron processes. PAT-3, UNC-112, and TLN-1 reporters were detected in the PLM mechanosensory neurons and their ventral branches. These observations identify integrin adhesion components expressed in the touch receptor neurons.

chunks.section_title: Figure 6. TLN-1 and RPM-1 colocalize in mechanosensory neurons
chunks.text: Figure 6. TLN-1 and RPM-1 colocalize in mechanosensory neurons. TLN-1::GFP overlapped with RPM-1 puncta at presynaptic regions in the PLM mechanosensory neurons.
The animals carried integrated fluorescent reporters to mark mechanosensory neuron morphology. This methods-only marker context does not establish a new gene expression annotation.
